# textProvider

**Instance Property**

The text to display in the complication.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var textProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property supports multicolor text.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **imageProvider**: The image to display.
